content-desc: Excel At Life Web Link Button

children.text: Please report problems or suggestions for us to address.
Receive daily reminder in notification bar to use app
Reminder default is 6:AM. Tap to change.
Password protect diary and other data
Determine availability of backup/restore for your device
Automatically save data to device's storage--either SD card or internal (useful for reinstall)
Opt out of sending usage data. Usage data helps us improve this app. We will not re-release it.
